title: Pistolochia slivenensis
taxonomy: Pistolochia slivenensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It is native to Southeastern Europe. Pistolochia slivenensis belongs to the genus Pistolochia, which is a part of the Rutaceae family. The classification of Pistolochia slivenensis is further grouped into the order Sapindales. As a member of the Rutaceae family, Pistolochia slivenensis is also known as a citrus relative.
